heading: Hobbies &
description: When I'm not writing code or debugging architecture, here is where I spend my time.

gaming.description: I love immersive storytelling and high-stakes competition across PC and console.

crypto.description: Fascinated by decentralized finance and block-chain ecosystems. Actively tracking crypto markets, tokenomics, and the underlying algorithms powering digital assets.

pcBuilding.description: Strong passion for computer hardware. I have built various types of PCs, completely configured from scratch.
